method_summary: Decoding Time Verification (DTV) treats structural boundaries as meta steps for verifier-guided decoding, interleaving generation with verifier calls under a state-machine controller that enforces valid prefixes using structural-boundary checks and structure-aware rollback.
key_innovation: Decoding Time Verification (DTV) framework that treats structural boundaries as meta steps for verifier-guided decoding with structure-aware rollback.
title: Verifier-Guided Code Translation via Meta-Step Decoding
